description: Address all 7 issues from the code review: CORS wildcard origin, ranking tie-break order, cloud persistence error handling, GitHub OIDC CloudFront scope, request body size validation, refresh token race condition, and Google client secret handling.
steps: Fix CORS wildcard origin in backend-stack.ts - restrict to CloudFront domain + localhost
Fix ranking tie-break order in submitResult.ts - invert timestamp for correct first-to-achieve semantics
Fix cloud persistence fire-and-forget in progressTracker.ts - return sync status
Fix cloud sync error surfacing in quizStore.ts
Fix GitHub OIDC CloudFront scope in github-oidc-stack.ts - accept distribution ID
Add request body size validation to Lambda handlers
Fix refresh token race condition in src/auth/client.ts
Fix Google client secret handling in auth-stack.ts - use Secrets Manager reference
acceptance_criteria: CORS only allows specific origins (CloudFront domain + localhost for dev)
Rankings sort first-to-achieve higher within same score
Cloud persistence failure is reported via a returned status or callback
GitHub OIDC role scopes CloudFront to specific distribution ARN
Lambda handlers reject bodies larger than 100KB
Concurrent getAccessToken calls deduplicate refresh token requests
Google client secret uses SecretValue.secretsManager instead of unsafePlainText
verification: cd infra && npx tsc --noEmit && npx cdk synth --quiet
findings: All 7 review issues addressed in a single commit. CDK synth succeeds for all 4 stacks. Backend tests (20/20) pass. Frontend typecheck clean. Only pre-existing test failure remains (getQuestionById in questionStore.test.ts, unrelated to these changes). The cross-stack reference from FrontendStack to GitHubOidcStack for distributionId produces a CDK warning about cross-stack reference strength (non-blocking).
